name: puppetmaster
description: Puppet Master — 로컬 코드 인덱싱/탐색 데스크톱 앱
author: roykang75 <roykang75@gmail.com>

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run typecheck:renderer && vite build
scripts.predev: node scripts/abi.js ensure electron && node scripts/dev-brand-macos.js
scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm:dev:renderer" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && playwright test
scripts.rebuild:electron: CXXFLAGS=-std=c++20 electron-rebuild -f -w tree-sitter,tree-sitter-c,tree-sitter-cpp,tree-sitter-python,tree-sitter-typescript,tree-sitter-java,better-sqlite3,node-pty && node scripts/abi.js mark electron
scripts.rebuild:node: npm rebuild tree-sitter tree-sitter-c tree-sitter-cpp tree-sitter-python tree-sitter-typescript tree-sitter-java better-sqlite3 node-pty && node scripts/abi.js mark node
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && electron-builder --mac
scripts.postinstall: node scripts/abi.js mark node && node scripts/dev-brand-macos.js
